resources.string: Remove your manually edited author, artist, description, tags and status, then restore the source values?
This will permanently delete the folder and all files for each selected novel, and remove them from the library. This cannot be undone.
Could not open folder — no file manager found
Failed to delete %d novel(s) — check permissions
Are you sure you want to remove the selected chapters from the database? Downloaded files will not be affected.
Are you sure you want to remove all chapters from the selected entries? Downloaded files will not be affected.
Show batch details and action buttons
Delete this batch from the queue
Re-import failed URLs from this batch
Save all URLs to a text file
Save failed URLs to a text file
Copy import report (added, skipped, errors) to clipboard
Save import report to a text file
This will permanently remove this batch from the import queue.
This will remove all completed and cancelled batches from the queue.
This will remove all pending URLs from the input field.
This will stop all pending and running import batches.
No readable URLs found in selected files
Too many URLs to copy — use export to file instead
Fetch and sync chapter list immediately (slower but chapters appear right away)
Fetch title, description, author, and cover from source
Advanced settings are only available in WebView rendering mode.
No CSS or JS Snippets are available in this mode
Only translate if language differs from target
No translation engine configured. Please configure one in Settings > Translation.
Add translated title to alternative titles
Configure translation engine and API keys in Settings → Translation
Add delays between downloads to avoid rate limiting
Maximum random delay added to base delay (ms)
Minimum random delay added to base delay (ms)
Add delays during library updates for novels
Add 3-8 minute delays every 5 novels during library updates
Delay between checking novels during updates (ms)
Add delays during mass import operations
\n⚠ Low delay values may cause sources to rate-limit or block your IP. A minimum of 3 seconds is recommended.
Delay between novels for the same extension
Number of different extensions updating simultaneously (not within same extension)
Apply delays between novels from the same source only
Delay between imports from the same source (different sources run concurrently)
Number of different sources importing simultaneously (throttle between same source is in delay setting)
Skip processing remaining urls from a source if details fetch fails X times consecutively. 0 to disable.
Automatically resume paused download queue when new chapters are added
0 = store (no compression, fastest), 1-9 = deflate (smaller files, slower)
Embed images from chapter HTML as base64 for offline viewing
Images larger than this will be compressed (0 = no limit)
Quality for compressed images (higher = larger file)
Tap an element to select it
Enter a name for your custom source:
Couldn\'t capture the search address. Make sure you searched for the exact word.
Type a word, then use the website\'s own search box to look for it. The search address is captured automatically.
Enable at least one of Popular or Latest.
Note: this builds a source by reading the page HTML. Sites that load content with JavaScript or AJAX may not work fully.
Chapter list is on a separate page
Chapters are numbered (generate from URL pattern)
Check the captured selectors, run a full test, then save.
Note: Downloaded chapters will be included. Chapters not yet downloaded will be fetched from the source.
Combine all files into one novel
Automatically add imported EPUBs to this category
This novel will be under "Local novels" after import in Browse.
Flexible group matching (allow at least one match)
Join EPUB volumes into one file
Only chapters with translations will be included.
Two EPUB files will be created — one original, one translated.
Only downloaded chapters will be included.
Downloaded chapters will be used. Undownloaded chapters will be fetched from source.
Translated chapters will be used when available.
No novels could be exported. Check chapter availability (downloaded, local, or translated).
Failed to write to output file
No rules added. Rules apply to chapter content before rendering.
Hide manga library tab, manga browse tabs, and manga settings.
Configure translation engines in Settings → Novel → Translation
Download chapter content if not already available
Maximum time to wait for translation response (seconds)
Show warning when translating more than this many chapters
Don\'t show warning for large batch translations
For pre-built novel source themes (Madara, LightNovelWP, etc.), install extensions from a repository instead.
Enable if chapters are listed newest first
Enable if the site uses POST requests for search
Enable for novel/text sources, disable for manga/manhwa/webtoon sources
Manga sources must be based on an installed extension. Pick a base source.
Create a custom source that delegates to an installed extension with a different name/URL
Select an installed novel extension to base your custom source on. You can override the name and base URL.
No novel extensions installed. Install extensions from the Extensions tab first.
Read on each novel\'s page to set its length. Preferred, so the source works for every novel.
Fallback only. A fixed value applies to every novel, so it fits single-novel sources.
Optional. Map this site\'s status words to ongoing/completed/hiatus/cancelled.
Use {n} for the chapter number, and {novelUrl} for the novel path so the pattern works across novels.
Comma-separated selectors stripped from the content before display.
Optional. Java SimpleDateFormat pattern, e.g. MMM d, yyyy. Needed for worded dates.
One per line, e.g. Referer: https://example.com
Optional. Query used when testing this source.
Optional. A novel details-page URL. Lets the reading test open a known novel without using a listing.
A source with this name and base URL already exists
On the popular/trending page, tap a novel\'s TITLE link. To also grab thumbnails, tap the COVER first, then the title.
If the title tap only catches the inner text, switch to its parent <a> in the next dialog so links resolve. The cover is optional: skip it and the lists just show no thumbnails.
Navigate to the latest/updates page, then continue. Only tap cover+title if its layout differs from popular.
Latest reuses the popular card selectors by default — you just need to land on the latest page so its URL is captured.
Tap \"Set up search\", type a word, then run it on the site.

Your word is swapped for {query} in the captured address to build the search template. Pick a word that returns results, and mind capitalization since some sites treat \"Sword\" and \"sword\" differently.
Open page 2 of this list (via the site\'s pagination), then continue.
The page-2 address is compared with page 1 to learn the page pattern — works for ?page= and /page/ styles alike. Continue without going to page 2 to leave it single-page.
Select in order: 1) Title, 2) Description/Summary, 3) Cover image, then 4+) any number of Tag/Genre elements (optional, merged together)
Tags are merged into one genre string; pick as many as you want.
Select chapter items: Click on the TITLE/LINK of chapters
One chapter is enough; more improves selector accuracy.
On the novel page, tap the link that opens the full chapter list / table of contents.
Use this when chapters live on a separate page. The source follows this link to read them.
Tap the \'next page\' link of the chapter list, or continue to skip.
For chapter lists that span multiple pages.
Tap two chapters (any two), then the element showing the total chapter count.
The two taps learn the numbered URL; the count element sets each novel\'s length.
Tap a chapter\'s upload date, or continue to skip.
Captures the per-chapter date selector. Skip if the list shows no dates.
Select the main text container element
Pick the text container; boilerplate (ads, nav) is stripped automatically.
Are you sure you want to delete this custom source?
Create a custom source to scrape novels from any website
Manage JS plugin and novel extension repositories
Guided setup to select elements visually
Only translate if language differs from target
No translation engine configured. Please configure one in Settings > Translation.
Add translated title to alternative titles
Only chapters with translations will be included.
Two EPUB files will be created — one original, one translated.
Ignore \'Skip recently updated\' and force update
Skip entries that were recently updated during bulk updates
Skip if updated in last %d day(s)
Delete downloaded chapters and local novel files?
Running VACUUM (this may take a while)…
Database maintenance started — check notifications for progress
Show source name in manga details
Display source name under status on manga details screen

Load each category a page at a time (default 300, newest first) and load more as you scroll, instead of holding the whole library in memory. Sorting, filtering and search apply to the entries loaded so far. Restart after changing.
Entries loaded per category per page when pagination is on. Lower means less memory but more loads while scrolling. Currently %1$d. Restart after changing.
Use native cheerio for JS plugins
Experimental: parse plugin HTML with bundled real cheerio (full API) instead of the Jsoup wrapper. Slower but more compatible. Reopen the chapter to apply.
Do you want to save your edits to this chapter?
No quotes saved for this novel
Chapter is empty — the source returned no text. Try refreshing or checking the source/extension.
Source does not support this operation
Out of memory — chapter may be too large
Battery icon reflects charging state when plugged in
Reorder and toggle time, chapter, progress and battery
